channel.title: Mac Trackpad Fix Updates
channel.description: Most recent updates to Mac Trackpad Fix

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
Mac Trackpad Fix 2.0

TrackpadVolumeKnob has been renamed to Mac Trackpad Fix — same app, better name.

  • Renamed to Mac Trackpad Fix
  • New icon — trackpad with rotation arrows
  • All existing settings and preferences are preserved

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
v1.1.0 — Pinch to Brightness

  • Pinch gesture — spread to increase brightness, pinch to decrease (built-in + external displays via DDC)
  • Sparkle auto-updater — Check for Updates in the menu bar, daily background checks
  • Pinch on/off toggle and target (brightness or volume) in Settings → Gestures
  • Settings → General: auto-update toggle

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Initial Release

  • Two-finger rotation for volume and brightness control
  • Post-lift fling momentum (DragCurve physics)
  • Haptic trackpad feedback (Off / Light / Medium / Strong)
  • Per-app exclusion list (22 presets)
  • Modifier key to switch between volume and brightness
  • External display brightness via DDC
